M-PESA Smart UI DesignerNext.js design system foundation for gradual migration

Design System

Colors, typography, icons, avatars, images, effects and editable token foundations.

Presentation

Phone preview, screen registry, flow chooser, export dropdown and scenario runner.

Component Library

Reusable component documentation with props, variants, states and token dependencies.

Registered Screens

18 screens indexed from the current HTML project.

Lehulum HomeFirst VisitMy QR CodeScan QRVerify ReceiptSend Money MenuSelect BankEnter Amount

Registered Flows

6 flows mapped to first-screen navigation.

Lehulum HomeSend MoneyBill PaymentMerchant PaymentAccountAuth and Security

Component Coverage

20 components documented for Next.js implementation.

ButtonActions
Icon ButtonActions
Text FieldForms
Amount InputForms
PIN InputForms
OTP InputForms
Numeric KeypadForms
